content:

files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
summary: Added path_transform param to BaseLoader-derived classes: FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source, PackageLoader.__init__/get_source, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader.__init__/get_source/load, ChoiceLoader.__init__/get_source/load. Only touched __init__ signature (appended path_transform kwarg) and get_source bodies of FileSystemLoader - did not touch list_templates or fallback_searchpath, should merge cleanly with your fallback_searchpath addition.
